title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 argues that humans remain superior to AI at reliably editing complex documents like .docx files because AI struggles with the underlying structural logic that holds meaning together across pages. The talk frames documents as software-like structures with their own rules, and notes that while computers can operate at scale, they require trustworthy edits that treat documents as programs rather than plain text files.
